meaning: n.[生化](角)鲨烯,三十碳六烯
examples: Specifically, squalene is the gooey oil squeezed from the liver of a shark.
Olive oil, wheat germ oil, and rice bran oil also naturally contain squalene, albeit in smaller amounts.
TAK-475 blocked squalene synthase, another liver chemical further down in the chain of biochemical reactions the statins shut off.
So a squalene synthase inhibitor should make a statin more powerful.
